question_intent: Calculate the average charge amount for members who have made payments and are from regions with more than one corporation

plan.question_intent: Calculate the average charge amount for members who have made payments and are from regions with more than one corporation
plan.detail_query: SELECT leaf_1.member_no, leaf_1.charge_amt, leaf_1.region_name, leaf_1.corp_count FROM (SELECT c.member_no, c.charge_amt, r.region_name, COUNT(DISTINCT co.corp_no) AS corp_count FROM charge AS c JOIN member AS m ON c.member_no = m.member_no JOIN payment AS p ON c.member_no = p.member_no JOIN region AS r ON m.region_no = r.region_no JOIN corporation AS co ON r.region_no = co.region_no GROUP BY c.member_no, c.charge_amt, r.region_name HAVING (COUNT(DISTINCT p.payment_no) > 0) AND (COUNT(DISTINCT co.corp_no) > 1)) AS leaf_1

steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM charge AS c
JOIN member AS m ON c.member_no = m.member_no
JOIN payment AS p ON c.member_no = p.member_no
JOIN region AS r ON m.region_no = r.region_no
LIMIT 5

steps.clause: JOIN corporation AS co ON r.region_no = co.region_no
steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM charge AS c
JOIN member AS m ON c.member_no = m.member_no
JOIN payment AS p ON c.member_no = p.member_no
JOIN region AS r ON m.region_no = r.region_no
JOIN corporation AS co ON r.region_no = co.region_no
LIMIT 5

SELECT c.member_no, c.charge_amt, r.region_name, COUNT(DISTINCT co.corp_no) AS corp_count
FROM charge AS c
JOIN member AS m ON c.member_no = m.member_no
JOIN payment AS p ON c.member_no = p.member_no
JOIN region AS r ON m.region_no = r.region_no
JOIN corporation AS co ON r.region_no = co.region_no
GROUP BY c.member_no, c.charge_amt, r.region_name
HAVING (COUNT(DISTINCT p.payment_no) > 0)

SELECT c.member_no, c.charge_amt, r.region_name, COUNT(DISTINCT co.corp_no) AS corp_count
FROM charge AS c
JOIN member AS m ON c.member_no = m.member_no
JOIN payment AS p ON c.member_no = p.member_no
JOIN region AS r ON m.region_no = r.region_no
JOIN corporation AS co ON r.region_no = co.region_no
GROUP BY c.member_no, c.charge_amt, r.region_name
HAVING (COUNT(DISTINCT p.payment_no) > 0) AND (COUNT(DISTINCT co.corp_no) > 1)

SELECT c.member_no, c.charge_amt, r.region_name, COUNT(DISTINCT co.corp_no) AS corp_count
FROM charge AS c
JOIN member AS m ON c.member_no = m.member_no
JOIN payment AS p ON c.member_no = p.member_no
JOIN region AS r ON m.region_no = r.region_no
JOIN corporation AS co ON r.region_no = co.region_no
GROUP BY c.member_no, c.charge_amt, r.region_name
HAVING (COUNT(DISTINCT p.payment_no) > 0) AND (COUNT(DISTINCT co.corp_no) > 1)

build_logs.notes: Calculate the average charge amount for the filtered members

steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM (SELECT c.member_no, c.charge_amt, r.region_name, COUNT(DISTINCT co.corp_no) AS corp_count
FROM charge AS c
JOIN member AS m ON c.member_no = m.member_no
JOIN payment AS p ON c.member_no = p.member_no
JOIN region AS r ON m.region_no = r.region_no
JOIN corporation AS co ON r.region_no = co.region_no
GROUP BY c.member_no, c.charge_amt, r.region_name
HAVING (COUNT(DISTINCT p.payment_no) > 0) AND (COUNT(DISTINCT co.corp_no) > 1)) AS leaf_1
LIMIT 5

SELECT AVG(leaf_1.charge_amt)
FROM (SELECT c.member_no, c.charge_amt, r.region_name, COUNT(DISTINCT co.corp_no) AS corp_count
FROM charge AS c
JOIN member AS m ON c.member_no = m.member_no
JOIN payment AS p ON c.member_no = p.member_no
JOIN region AS r ON m.region_no = r.region_no
JOIN corporation AS co ON r.region_no = co.region_no
GROUP BY c.member_no, c.charge_amt, r.region_name
HAVING (COUNT(DISTINCT p.payment_no) > 0) AND (COUNT(DISTINCT co.corp_no) > 1)) AS leaf_1

nearest.sql:
SELECT AVG(leaf_1.charge_amt)
FROM (SELECT m.member_no, m.firstname, m.lastname, c.charge_no, c.charge_amt, p.payment_no, p.payment_amt, r.region_name, cat.category_desc
FROM member AS m
JOIN charge AS c ON m.member_no = c.member_no
JOIN payment AS p ON m.member_no = p.member_no
JOIN region AS r ON m.region_no = r.region_no
JOIN category AS cat ON c.category_no = cat.category_no
WHERE (p.payment_amt > 10000)
GROUP BY m.member_no, c.charge_no, p.payment_no
HAVING (COUNT(DISTINCT cat.category_no) >= 1)) AS leaf_1

SELECT AVG(leaf_2.charge_amt)
FROM (SELECT c.charge_no, c.member_no, c.charge_dt, c.charge_amt, m.region_no
FROM charge AS c
JOIN member AS m ON c.member_no = m.member_no
JOIN region AS r ON m.region_no = r.region_no
WHERE (c.member_no IN ((SELECT DISTINCT p.member_no
FROM payment AS p))) AND (r.region_name IN ('North American', 'South American'))) AS leaf_2

question: What is the average charge amount across all members who have at least one payment and are associated with more than one corporation?
